title: Garmin’s CIRQA Smart Band just leaked with a surprisingly competitive price
summary: Here's how much Garmin's CIRQA Smart Band may cost.
body: Credit: Ryan Haines / Android Authority TL;DR A leak appears to have revealed the pricing for the CIRQA Smart Band. Garmin’s own pricing system lists the device at $199.99 USD, $279.99 CAD, and $4,099 MXN. Garmin is currently working on a screenless fitness tracker called the CIRQA Smart Band. Although the company has yet to announce the device, it accidentally revealed the tracker’s existence on its website earlier this year. Since then, numerous leaks have revealed various capabilities and features . Now, we may know how much it will cost when the CIRQA Smart Band launches. Garmin’s own pricing system may have spilled the beans on the pricing for the CIRQA tracker. Spotted by a Redditor , the company’s backend appears to recognize the CIRQA part number 010-04675-00, which was revealed in that first leak back in January. By entering the part number into a publicly accessible Garmin endpoint , the system returns a US price point of $199.99.

title: Google Health has fixed the outage that broke sync for Fitbit & Pixel Watch owners [U]
summary: A widespread outage on July 15 has broken device sync for “all” Google Health users.

title: Google Health 5.03 rolls out: More Today stats, naps part of sleep total [U]
summary: Google is rolling out version 5.03 of the Health app with more quality-of-life updates on Android and iOS.

title: Samsung officially confirms everything new on Galaxy Watch 9 in teaser [Video]
summary: Ahead of its debut barely a week from now, Samsung is officially teasing the Galaxy Watch 9 with its returning circle-on-a-square design, new health insights, and an “all-new inside.”
